transcript: Speaker A: समजत का नाय रे तुला? [Don't you understand?] Speaker B: अरे ए बाबा काय झालं? का मारतोयस त्याला उगाच? [Hey, what happened? Why hit him?] Speaker A: अरे याला किती वेळा सांगितलं की फक्त एका कॉफीच्या किमतीत इंग्लिश शिकता येते, पण हा अजून पण महागड्या क्लासेस मध्ये हजार रुपये उडवतोय. प्रत्येक महिन्याला पैसे वेस्ट करतो आणि मिटिंग मध्ये एक लाईन सुद्धा बरोबर बोलू शकत नाही. [Told him many times English can be learned for the price of a coffee, but he wastes thousands on expensive classes and can't speak in meetings.] Speaker B: काय? एवढे पैसे खर्च करून एक पण लाईन नाही बोलू शकत? अजून दोन-तीन मार याला! [What? Wasting money and can't speak? Hit him more!] Speaker A: पैसे वाचवा, स्पीक स्मार्ट, डाऊनलोड SpeakX. [Save money, speak smart, download SpeakX.]
on_screen_text: samjhat ka nay re tula [Don't you understand?] arrey e baba kay zhala ka martoys tyala ugaach ? [Why hit him?] arey yala kiti vela sangitla [Told him so many times] Your Daily Practice Goal, Expensive English Coaching, pratek mahinyala paise waste karto [Wasting money monthly] kay yevdhe paise kharcha karun ek pan line nahi bolu shakat [Can't speak a line after spending so much] ajun don teen maar yala [Hit him more] speak smart, SpeakX KEY TO CONFIDENCE DOWNLOAD NOW
summary: A comedic skit where a man is scolded for wasting money on expensive English classes while failing to speak in meetings. The ad promotes SpeakX as an affordable alternative costing only as much as a cup of coffee. It ends with a call to download the app.
